steps.name: bootstrap
steps.summary: Next.js 15 + TypeScript strict + Tailwind bootstrapped with full directory scaffold, env.example, vitest config, and all AC checks passing

steps.name: env-validation
steps.summary: src/lib/env.ts parses process.env through Zod, throws with missing key names on import; clientEnv exports only NEXT_PUBLIC_* keys; 4 tests passing

steps.name: supabase-schema
steps.summary: 0001_init.sql migration creates all tables + enums + indices; admin.ts and client.ts typed against Database; seed.sql inserts one patient, one prescription, three inventory items, one spending rule; typecheck passes

steps.name: photon-outbound
steps.summary: src/services/photon/app.ts + outbound.ts implemented; smoke-photon.ts confirmed iMessage delivery to caretaker phone via bun; note: use bun instead of npx tsx (package requires bun ESM resolution)

steps.name: photon-inbound
steps.summary: 0002_outbox.sql migration added; commandRouter.ts routes status/rules/reorder/approve/block intents via Supabase; worker.ts initializes Spectrum, drains outbox every 2s, handles inbound with soft-auth; outbox.ts enqueueMessage helper added; Database types updated with Relationships+Views+Functions for strict supabase-js v2 compat; 11 tests passing, typecheck clean

steps.name: gemini-wrapper
steps.summary: gemini/client.ts implements analyzeImage<T> with Zod schema validation and one retry; medication.ts exports verifyMedication(); pantry.ts exports inventoryAssessment(); 21 tests passing, typecheck clean
